published_prior_art.cite: LuShiFangZhangDing2025BipartiteDesign gives the homogeneous Bernoulli bipartite Hajek variance, CLT, and conservative variance benchmark.

repo_prior_art.cite: No in-catalogue experimentation entry has a bipartite heterogeneous-Bernoulli Hajek graph-only variance envelope; exp_design_pm1_exactness_boundary_v1 concerns one-mode covariance-SDP implementability.

published_prior_art.cite: LuShiFangZhangDing2025BipartiteDesign treats common Bernoulli(p) and explicitly leaves Bernoulli(p_k) analysis to future work; HarshawSavjeEisenstatMirrokniPougetAbadie2021BipartiteERL is linear exposure-response model based.

repo_prior_art.cite: exp_design_pm1_exactness_boundary_v1 optimizes implementable covariance geometry, not heterogeneous intervention-unit Bernoulli probabilities for a bipartite Hajek estimator.

published_prior_art.cite: Viviano2026NetworkDesign optimizes pilot-estimated precision for one-mode two-wave network experiments; no checked paper solves this graph-only bipartite heterogeneous-p envelope minimization.

repo_prior_art.cite: The in-catalogue exp_ego_cluster_exposure_clt angle was downgraded because exposure bookkeeping plus a dependency-graph CLT is not by itself a new design object.

published_prior_art.cite: LuShiFangZhangDing2025BipartiteDesign proves the homogeneous bipartite Hajek CLT; Leung2019ApproxNeighborhoodInterference proves IPW normality under non-identical Bernoulli assignment in a different one-mode ANI setting.

repo_prior_art.cite: No in-catalogue entry gives post-design conservative variance for graph-optimized heterogeneous bipartite Hajek assignment.

published_prior_art.cite: LuShiFangZhangDing2025BipartiteDesign gives homogeneous conservative variance; HarshawMiddletonSavje2021OptimizedVariance and ParkWager2026NeymanJackknife give adjacent general conservative-variance frameworks.

repo_prior_art.cite: exp_design_pm1_exactness_boundary_v1 leaves an exact phase frontier for covariance implementability, not a reciprocal-product Bernoulli surrogate certificate.

published_prior_art.cite: UganderKarrerBackstromKleinberg2013GraphClusterRandomization and UganderYin2020RandomizedGCR give graph-cluster variance controls, not a constant-factor certificate for heterogeneous bipartite Bernoulli envelope design.

soundness_flags.label: headline / def:optimal-design / thm:convex-design
soundness_flags.one_line: The core calls p_n^*(G_n) minimax and sells a minimax choice of probabilities, but the statements only minimize the conservative upper envelope V_env and never state that V_env equals the worst-case variance over bounded potential outcomes.

soundness_flags.label: thm:postdesign-wald
soundness_flags.one_line: The coverage claim says uniformly over all bounded potential outcomes even though it invokes thm:hetero-clt, whose assumptions include the Y-dependent variance-nondegeneracy condition.

soundness_flags.label: def:hetero-hajek-estimator / thm:hetero-clt
soundness_flags.one_line: The Hajek ratios can have zero all-treated or all-control exposure denominators with positive finite-n probability, so the estimator needs an explicit convention on those events or a denominator-positive restriction.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Either rename the headline object to envelope-optimal heterogeneous Bernoulli design or add a sharpness theorem showing V_env is the exact supremum of sigma_{G_n,p}^2(Y) over the bounded centered outcome schedules.

Restate the Wald theorem over the class satisfying bounded outcomes plus a uniform variance lower bound, or weaken the claim from uniform coverage to pointwise asymptotic coverage under ass:variance-nondegenerate.
Add a zero-denominator convention for the Hajek estimator and prove that the exceptional event is o(1) under bounded degree and the positivity floor.
Correct or anchor the Viviano metadata: the arXiv record for Experimental Design under Network Interference is 2020 unless the proposal intends a separate 2026 publication version.

recommended_next_step: Continue revise on this field-tier angle: fix the minimax-versus-envelope overclaim and the two inference well-posedness issues, then advance to Stage 0 if no new flags appear.
